5e090ec230ec4283: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM transactions WHERE category = 'Groceries'
f2681b9c385d32db:
SELECT txn_id, date, amount, category, merchant, account_id 
FROM transactions 
WHERE date >= DATE('now', '-7 days')
5aeca31b7d41684a:
SELECT b.category, b.monthly_budget, SUM(t.amount) AS total_spent 
FROM budget_rules b 
JOIN transactions t ON b.category = t.category 
WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', t.date) = strftime('%Y-%m', 'now') 
GROUP BY b.category 
HAVING SUM(t.amount) > b.monthly_budget
017e1ce7db688ad9:
SELECT category, SUM(amount) AS total_spending
FROM transactions
WHERE category IN ('Groceries', 'Dining', 'Transport', 'Entertainment', 'Utilities', 'Shopping', 'Health', 'Travel', 'Subscriptions', 'Rent')
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY total_spending DESC
LIMIT 5
05af628a1c9a37cd: SELECT category, AVG(amount) AS avg_amount FROM transactions GROUP BY category
00365ce2f45f5c30: SELECT merchant FROM transactions GROUP BY merchant ORDER BY COUNT(merchant) DESC LIMIT 1
d9f9f8e1c3a83fab:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN t.category = 'Dining' THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END) AS dining,
  SUM(CASE WHEN t.category = 'Groceries' THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END) AS groceries
FROM 
  transactions t
WHERE 
  strftime('%Y-%m', t.date) = strftime('%Y-%m', 'now')
eeead38d14ef62ed:
SELECT a.account_name, SUM(t.amount) AS total_spending 
FROM transactions t 
JOIN accounts a ON t.account_id = a.account_id 
GROUP BY a.account_name
8a577afcf846e8e5:
SELECT SUM(t.amount) 
FROM transactions t 
JOIN budget_rules b ON t.category = b.category 
WHERE t.date >= DATE('now', '-30 days') AND b.category = 'Travel'
a328605630d36097: SELECT txn_id FROM transactions WHERE amount > 100
a29b04120cd91915: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM transactions WHERE date >= DATE('now', '-7 days')
7d6a96963da817fa:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN t.category = 'Groceries' THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END) AS groceries,
       SUM(CASE WHEN t.category = 'Dining' THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END) AS dining,
       SUM(CASE WHEN t.category = 'Transport' THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END) AS transport
FROM transactions t
WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', t.date) >= strftime('%Y-%m', date('now', '-3 months'))
162ce066a231c316:
SELECT DISTINCT t.category, t.merchant 
FROM transactions t 
JOIN budget_rules b ON t.category = b.category 
WHERE t.category = 'Dining'
4d944b1bd2882c34:
SELECT merchant 
FROM transactions 
WHERE category = 'Dining' AND merchant NOT IN ('Zaatar w Zeit', 'Local Cafe', 'Starbucks')
